main.set_name: The Lost Caverns of Ixalan Commander
main.name: Hakbal of the Surging Soul
main.oracle_text:
At the beginning of combat on your turn, each Merfolk creature you control explores. (Reveal the top card of your library. Put that card into your hand if it's a land. Otherwise, put a +1/+1 counter on the exploring creature, then put the card back or put it into your graveyard.)
Whenever Hakbal attacks, you may put a land card from your hand onto the battlefield. If you don't, draw a card.

card.name: Heroic Intervention
card.oracle_text: Permanents you control gain hexproof and indestructible until end of turn.

card.name: Swan Song
card.oracle_text: Counter target enchantment, instant, or sorcery spell. Its controller creates a 2/2 blue Bird creature token with flying.
card.flavor_text: The gracefulness of their flight makes one wonder whether Nature or, indeed, a rare sort of Magic lifts their wings.

card.name: Sword of Truth and Justice
Merrow Harbinger
card.oracle_text:
Islandwalk (This creature can't be blocked as long as defending player controls an Island.)
When this creature enters, you may search your library for a Merfolk card, reveal it, then shuffle and put that card on top.

card.name: Merrow Commerce
card.oracle_text: At the beginning of your end step, untap all Merfolk you control.
card.flavor_text: Schools meet and mingle on Lorwyn's riverways. In the bustling interplay, the merrow renew their sense of community as they sharpen their wits and hone their trading skills.

card.name: Exploration
card.oracle_text: You may play an additional land on each of your turns.
card.flavor_text: With every step she took, a new world unfolded before her.

card.name: Thada Adel, Acquisitor
card.oracle_text:
Islandwalk (This creature can't be blocked as long as defending player controls an Island.)
Whenever Thada Adel deals combat damage to a player, search that player's library for an artifact card and exile it. Then that player shuffles. Until end of turn, you may play that card.

card.name: Thassa's Rebuff
card.oracle_text: Counter target spell unless its controller pays {X}, where X is your devotion to blue. (Each {U} in the mana costs of permanents you control counts toward your devotion to blue.)
card.flavor_text: To resist Thassa is to deny the rising tide.

card.name: Aquitect's Will
card.oracle_text: Put a flood counter on target land. That land is an Island in addition to its other types for as long as it has a flood counter on it. If you control a Merfolk, draw a card.
card.flavor_text:
"You may want to hold your breath."
—Kellyg, merrow aquitect

card.name: Forerunner of the Heralds
card.oracle_text:
When this creature enters, you may search your library for a Merfolk card, reveal it, then shuffle and put that card on top.
Whenever another Merfolk you control enters, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

card.name: Jadelight Ranger
card.oracle_text: When this creature enters, it explores, then it explores again. (Reveal the top card of your library. Put that card into your hand if it's a land. Otherwise, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature, then put the card back or put it into your graveyard. Then repeat this process.)

card.name: Bred for the Hunt
card.oracle_text: Whenever a creature you control with a +1/+1 counter on it deals combat damage to a player, you may draw a card.
card.flavor_text: Some see the world as a place of infinite wonder and knowledge. Some see it as an infinite dinner plate.

card.name: Deepchannel Mentor
card.oracle_text: Blue creatures you control can't be blocked.
card.flavor_text: The rivers can no longer provide safe passage for travelers and commerce. They serve only as highways for raiders and channels for blood and woe.

card.name: Rejuvenating Springs
card.oracle_text:
This land enters tapped unless you have two or more opponents.
{T}: Add {G} or {U}.

card.name: Tide Shaper
card.oracle_text:
Kicker {1} (You may pay an additional {1} as you cast this spell.)
When this creature enters, if it was kicked, target land becomes an Island for as long as this creature remains on the battlefield.
This creature gets +1/+1 as long as an opponent controls an Island.

card.name: Boseiju, Who Endures
card.oracle_text:
{T}: Add {G}.
Channel — {1}{G}, Discard this card: Destroy target artifact, enchantment, or nonbasic land an opponent controls. That player may search their library for a land card with a basic land type, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle. This ability costs {1} less to activate for each legendary creature you control.

card.name: Otawara, Soaring City
card.oracle_text:
{T}: Add {U}.
Channel — {3}{U}, Discard this card: Return target artifact, creature, enchantment, or planeswalker to its owner's hand. This ability costs {1} less to activate for each legendary creature you control.

card.set_name: Commander Legends: Battle for Baldur's Gate
card.name: Decanter of Endless Water
card.oracle_text:
You have no maximum hand size.
{T}: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Mana Drain
card.oracle_text: Counter target spell. At the beginning of your next main phase, add an amount of {C} equal to that spell's mana value.
card.flavor_text: "I suppose you've never heard of conservation of energy."

card.name: Arcane Signet
card.oracle_text: {T}: Add one mana of any color in your commander's color identity.
card.flavor_text: All Necrons bear the mark of the Triarch, a brand upon their living-metal skin that binds them to their dynasty.

card.name: Reliquary Tower
card.oracle_text:
You have no maximum hand size.
{T}: Add {C}.
card.flavor_text:
"Let the others bicker over their little worlds and stars. I have an empire of knowledge, and it encompasses all others."
—Trazyn the Infinite

card.name: Cavern of Souls
card.oracle_text:
As this land enters, choose a creature type.
{T}: Add {C}.
{T}: Add one mana of any color. Spend this mana only to cast a creature spell of the chosen type, and that spell can't be countered.

card.set_name: The Lord of the Rings: Tales of Middle-earth
card.name: Entish Restoration
card.oracle_text: Sacrifice a land. Search your library for up to two basic land cards, put them onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. If you control a creature with power 4 or greater, instead search your library for up to three basic land cards, put them onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.
card.flavor_text: "Welcome to the Treegarth of Orthanc!"

card.name: Cultivate
card.oracle_text: Search your library for up to two basic land cards, reveal those cards, put one onto the battlefield tapped and the other into your hand, then shuffle.
card.flavor_text: All seeds share a common bond, calling to each other across infinity.

card.name: Rhystic Study
card.oracle_text: Whenever an opponent casts a spell, you may draw a card unless that player pays {1}.

card.name: Court of Garenbrig
card.oracle_text:
When this enchantment enters, you become the monarch.
At the beginning of your upkeep, distribute two +1/+1 counters among up to two target creatures. Then if you're the monarch, double the number of +1/+1 counters on each creature you control.

card.name: Andúril, Narsil Reforged
Lord of Atlantis
card.oracle_text: Other Merfolk get +1/+1 and have islandwalk. (They can't be blocked as long as defending player controls an Island.)

card.name: Command Tower
card.oracle_text: {T}: Add one mana of any color in your commander's color identity.
card.flavor_text:
"New Vegas is more than a city—it's the remedy to mankind's derailment."
—Mr. House

card.name: Deeproot Pilgrimage
card.oracle_text: Whenever one or more nontoken Merfolk you control become tapped, create a 1/1 blue Merfolk creature token with hexproof.
card.flavor_text: "These glyphs are more than trail markings! They tell a story as they go. But does it end in celebration or tragedy?"

card_faces.name: Twists and Turns
card_faces.oracle_text:
If a creature you control would explore, instead you scry 1, then that creature explores.
When this enchantment enters, target creature you control explores.
When a land you control enters, if you control seven or more lands, transform this enchantment.

card_faces.name: Mycoid Maze
card_faces.oracle_text:
(Transforms from Twists and Turns.)
{T}: Add {G}.
{3}{G}, {T}: Look at the top four cards of your library. You may reveal a creature card from among them and put that card into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

card.name: Nicanzil, Current Conductor
card.oracle_text:
Whenever a creature you control explores a land card, you may put a land card from your hand onto the battlefield tapped.
Whenever a creature you control explores a nonland card, put a +1/+1 counter on Nicanzil.

card.name: Tishana's Tidebinder
card.oracle_text:
Flash
When this creature enters, counter up to one target activated or triggered ability. If an ability of an artifact, creature, or planeswalker is countered this way, that permanent loses all abilities for as long as this creature remains on the battlefield. (Mana abilities can't be targeted.)

card.set_name: The Lost Caverns of Ixalan Commander
card.name: Singer of Swift Rivers
card.oracle_text:
Flash
When this creature enters, put a shield counter on another target creature you control. (If it would be dealt damage or destroyed, remove a shield counter from it instead.)
You may cast Merfolk spells as though they had flash.

card.set_name: The Lost Caverns of Ixalan Commander
card.name: Topography Tracker
card.oracle_text:
When this creature enters, create a Map token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: Target creature you control explores. Activate only as a sorcery.")
If a creature you control would explore, instead it explores, then it explores again.
card.flavor_text: "Good thing I'm not afraid of heights."

card.set_name: The Lost Caverns of Ixalan Commander
card.name: Wave Goodbye
card.oracle_text: Return each creature without a +1/+1 counter on it to its owner's hand.
card.flavor_text: Whatever the tide brings in, the shapers can wash away.

card.set_name: The Lost Caverns of Ixalan Commander
card.name: Ripples of Potential
card.oracle_text: Proliferate, then choose any number of permanents you control that had a counter put on them this way. Those permanents phase out. (To proliferate, choose any number of permanents and/or players, then give each another counter of each kind already there. Treat phased-out permanents and anything attached to them as though they don't exist until their controller's next turn.)

card.set_name: The Lost Caverns of Ixalan Commander
card.name: Branching Evolution
card.oracle_text: If one or more +1/+1 counters would be put on a creature you control, twice that many +1/+1 counters are put on that creature instead.
card.flavor_text: As Aclazotz's undead forces approached the temple of Ojer Kaslem, they met a roaring wall of vibrant, flourishing life.

card.set_name: The Lost Caverns of Ixalan Commander
card.name: Deeproot Elite
card.oracle_text: Whenever another Merfolk you control enters, put a +1/+1 counter on target Merfolk you control.
card.flavor_text: "You think I stand alone? I have the forest at my call, the waters at my back. I outnumber you."

card.set_name: The Lost Caverns of Ixalan Commander
card.name: Deeproot Waters
card.oracle_text: Whenever you cast a Merfolk spell, create a 1/1 blue Merfolk creature token with hexproof. (A creature with hexproof can't be the target of spells or abilities your opponents control.)
card.flavor_text: A visit to the Deeproot Tree and its ancient spring replenishes a merfolk's connection to nature.

card.set_name: The Lost Caverns of Ixalan Commander
card.name: Emperor Mihail II
card.oracle_text:
You may look at the top card of your library any time.
You may cast Merfolk spells from the top of your library.

card.set_name: The Lost Caverns of Ixalan Commander
card.name: Herald of Secret Streams
card.oracle_text: Creatures you control with +1/+1 counters on them can't be blocked.
card.flavor_text: "You might as well try to stop the waterfall."

card.set_name: The Lost Caverns of Ixalan Commander
card.name: Karn's Bastion
card.oracle_text:
{T}: Add {C}.
{4}, {T}: Proliferate. (Choose any number of permanents and/or players, then give each another counter of each kind already there.)
card.flavor_text:
"I can't protect everyone here. But those I can, I will."
—Karn

card.set_name: The Lost Caverns of Ixalan Commander
card.name: Kopala, Warden of Waves
card.oracle_text:
Spells your opponents cast that target a Merfolk you control cost {2} more to cast.
Abilities your opponents activate that target a Merfolk you control cost {2} more to activate.
card.flavor_text: "I know these waters better than you know yourselves."

card.set_name: The Lost Caverns of Ixalan Commander
card.name: Merfolk Sovereign
card.oracle_text:
Other Merfolk creatures you control get +1/+1.
{T}: Target Merfolk creature can't be blocked this turn.
card.flavor_text: "Be like the sea: flow around that which is unmovable; for everything else, crash into it unrelentingly."

card.set_name: The Lost Caverns of Ixalan Commander
card.name: Merrow Reejerey
card.oracle_text:
Other Merfolk creatures you control get +1/+1.
Whenever you cast a Merfolk spell, you may tap or untap target permanent.
card.flavor_text: Steady and silent as the deep current, the reejerey guides the course of the school.

card.set_name: The Lost Caverns of Ixalan Commander

card.oracle_text: Other Merfolk creatures you control get +1/+1 and have islandwalk. (They can't be blocked as long as defending player controls an Island.)
card.flavor_text: "Let the land dwellers know the coast is no longer the border between our realms. A new age of empire has begun."

card.set_name: The Lost Caverns of Ixalan Commander
card.name: Reflections of Littjara
card.oracle_text:
As this enchantment enters, choose a creature type.
Whenever you cast a spell of the chosen type, copy that spell. (A copy of a permanent spell becomes a token.)
card.flavor_text: The masks float downstream toward the Mirrorlake, where faces arise to wear them.

card.set_name: The Lost Caverns of Ixalan Commander
card.name: Seafloor Oracle
card.oracle_text: Whenever a Merfolk you control deals combat damage to a player, draw a card.
card.flavor_text: Where the light falls dim and blue on broken ships, secrets lie unclaimed.

card.oracle_text:
Islandwalk (This creature can't be blocked as long as defending player controls an Island.)
Merfolk spells and Wizard spells you cast cost {1} less to cast.
card.flavor_text: Made from trout scales and crawfish whiskers, merrows' shimmering banners flash in the water like lightning.

Svyelun has indestructible as long as you control at least two other Merfolk.

Indestructible

Tap another untapped Merfolk you control: Kumena can't be blocked this turn.

card.set_name: The Lost Caverns of Ixalan Commander
card.name: Vorel of the Hull Clade
card.oracle_text: {G}{U}, {T}: Double the number of each kind of counter on target artifact, creature, or land.
card.flavor_text: "I used to hurl rocks and eat scraps of meat burned over a fire. Look at what I've become and tell me Simic does not hold infinite possibility."

card.set_name: The Lost Caverns of Ixalan Commander

card.oracle_text:

Islandwalk (This creature can't be blocked as long as defending player controls an Island.)
Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, you may draw that many cards.

card.set_name: The Lost Caverns of Ixalan Commander
